book ticket: I can help you book a ticket. Please tell me your origin, destination, and date of journey. For example, 'Mumbai to Pune tomorrow'.
cancel ticket: To cancel a ticket, please provide your PNR number.
refund status: Refunds are processed within 3-5 working days. Please provide your PNR to check the exact status.
bus schedule: You can check the daily schedule for all routes in the Search section. Tell me the route to see timings.
track bus: Please provide the Bus Number or your PNR to track the live location.
parcel tracking: Please enter your Parcel Tracking ID (LR Number).
complaint status: To check your complaint status, please provide your Grievance ID.
pass renewal: You can renew your Monthly or Student pass from the Dashboard > Bus Passes section. Shall I take you there?
nearby depot: Please allow location access or tell me your current city so I can find the nearest MSRTC Depot for you.
emergency contacts: For emergencies during your journey, call the MSRTC Helpline: 1800-22-1250, or type 'SOS' for immediate assistance.
